framing: Clinical operations associate director at Pfizer seeking VP role at mid-size CRO

jd.title: Vice President — Clinical Operations
jd.style_note: Enterprise: specific regulatory and clinical trial knowledge, structured requirements, CRO-specific

requirements.text: 12+ years of clinical operations experience in pharma, biotech, or CRO with progressive leadership
Experience managing global clinical trials across Phases I-III with 50+ sites and 1,000+ patients
Deep knowledge of ICH-GCP (E6(R2)/E6(R3)) guidelines and FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliance
Experience with EDC systems (Medidata Rave, Oracle Clinical/InForm, or Veeva Vault CDMS)
Experience with risk-based monitoring (RBM) and centralized statistical monitoring approaches
Track record managing clinical operations teams of 30+ including CRAs, CTMs, and data managers
Experience with decentralized clinical trials (DCT): ePRO, eConsent, home nursing, wearable integration
Therapeutic area expertise in oncology, rare disease, or immunology
Experience with CTMS (Clinical Trial Management Systems): Veeva Vault, Oracle Siebel CTMS, or Medidata CTMS

responsibilities: Lead clinical operations for Medpace's oncology and rare disease therapeutic units
Oversee portfolio of 15-20 active clinical trials across Phases I-III globally
Manage clinical operations team of 80+ (clinical research associates, trial managers, regulatory coordinators)
Drive adoption of risk-based monitoring and decentralized trial technologies across Medpace
Interface with sponsor companies (biotech and pharma) on study execution, timelines, and budget management

expected_output.summary: Clinical operations leader with 14 years at Pfizer, most recently Associate Director of Clinical Operations in the Oncology division. Managed Phase II-III clinical trials across 35 countries for immuno-oncology programmes (anti-PD-1/PD-L1, ADC). Led trial execution for studies with 80+ sites and 800+ patients. Experience with Medidata Rave EDC, risk-based monitoring, and ICH-GCP compliance. Managed team of 22 CRAs and CTMs. Seeking VP-level step-up at mid-size CRO.

experience.title: Associate Director — Clinical Operations, Oncology
bullets: Led clinical operations for 3 Phase II-III oncology trials (anti-PD-L1 + ADC combination therapies) across 35 countries, 80+ sites, 800+ patients
Managed team of 22 clinical research associates (CRAs) and clinical trial managers (CTMs) across US, EU, and Asia-Pacific
Implemented risk-based monitoring (RBM) using Medidata Rave and centralized statistical monitoring for signal detection
Delivered ICH-GCP E6(R2) compliance across all study sites with zero critical audit findings over 4 FDA inspections
Managed CRO oversight for 2 outsourced trials (Covance/Labcorp and ICON) with combined budget of $45M

experience.title: Clinical Trial Manager (promoted from Senior CRA, 2017)
bullets: Managed site activation and enrollment for Phase II immunology trial (JAK inhibitor, 60 sites across 12 countries)
Conducted monitoring visits (on-site and remote) as Senior CRA for 15 oncology trial sites in US Northeast
Led implementation of Medidata Rave EDC for 3 study starts, including CRF design and edit check programming
Coordinated with data management team on database lock activities and SAE reconciliation

experience.title: Clinical Research Associate (entry level)
bullets: Performed site monitoring visits for cardiovascular and metabolic disease clinical trials
Managed TMF (Trial Master File) documentation and regulatory document collection
Completed Pfizer's Clinical Research Training Programme

education: MS Clinical Research — George Washington University (2010-2012)

jd_requirements: 12+ years clinical operations pharma biotech CRO progressive leadership
global clinical trials Phases I-III 50+ sites 1000+ patients
ICH-GCP E6(R2) E6(R3) FDA 21 CFR Part 11
EDC Medidata Rave Oracle Clinical InForm Veeva Vault CDMS
risk-based monitoring RBM centralized statistical monitoring
clinical operations teams 30+ CRAs CTMs data managers
decentralized clinical trials DCT ePRO eConsent wearable
CTMS Veeva Vault Oracle Siebel Medidata CTMS
deliberate_flaws: Never exceeded 800 patients — JD requires 1,000+ patient trial experience
Never exceeded 80 sites — JD requires 50+ but VP role typically manages multiple studies with 100+ sites each
Team of 22, not 30+ — JD requires managing 30+ team, VP role manages 80+
No Phase I experience (JD requires I-III, candidate has II-III only)
No ICH-GCP E6(R3) experience (new revision, only E6(R2))
No Oracle Clinical/InForm or Veeva Vault CDMS experience (only Medidata)
No decentralized clinical trial (DCT) experience — no ePRO, eConsent, or wearable integration
No rare disease therapeutic experience (oncology and immunology only)
No CRO-side experience — entire career at pharma sponsor (Pfizer), different operating model
No sponsor-facing experience from CRO perspective — has always been the sponsor
Associate Director to VP is a significant title jump — no VP experience
No Oracle Siebel CTMS experience (used Medidata CTMS)
